## Summary

- 

## Data Checklist

- [ ] Dates use `YYYY-MM-DD`.
- [ ] Each deadline has a timezone.
- [ ] Source URLs are included.
- [ ] New categories already exist in `data/categories.yml`.
- [ ] New venues include metadata under `data/venues/`.
- [ ] I did not guess rankings, impact factors, or deadlines.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate:data`
- [ ] `npm run build:data`
